calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Claire Sullivan for (petitioner) Alastair Alexander.

Ms. Sullivan confirmed that there have been no objections, that in regards to the assignment of personal property into the trust it could apply to financial assets, that the asset was on Schedule A and that there is sufficient evidence that it was to go into the trust. The petition to determine entitlement was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Mayo. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Entitlement
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Feb-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
